zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Newdegate於1496年8月18日出生在英國米德萊可哈利費爾德時，她的父親John Newdegate35歲，母親Amphilicia Neville37歲。她於1514年之前與Sir Robert Dormer在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1568年7月7日在比利時布拉班特 瓦隆奧迪尼尼-盧瓦-拉-福享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: Newdegate
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Newdigate (Surrey), which is recorded as Niudegate and Neudegate in about 1167 and Niwudegate in 1241. The place name appears to derive from Old English nīge, a secondary form of nīwe ‘new’, + wudu ‘wood’ + geat ‘gate, opening’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Newdegate was born on 18 August 1496, in Harefield, Middlesex, England, her father, John Newdegate, was 35 and her mother, Amphilicia Neville, was 37. She married Sir Robert Dormer before 1514, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 7 July 1568, in Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Walloon Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Newdegate est née le 18 août 1496, à Harefield, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, John Newdegate, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Amphilicia Neville, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Dormer avant 1514, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 7 juillet 1568, à Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Brabant wallon, Belgique, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Newdegateが1496年8月18日にイギリスミッドレセックスハーエフィールドで生まれた時，父John Newdegateは35歳，母Amphilicia Nevilleは37歳であった。1514年以前にイギリスでSir Robert Dormerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1568年7月7日にベルギーブラバント ワロンオッティグニース-ロウベイン-ラ-ネウブで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Newdegate(이)가 1496년 8월 18일 영국 미들레세스 하레필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Newdegate(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amphilicia Neville(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1514년 이전 영국에서 Sir Robert Dormer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1568년 7월 7일 벨기에 브라반트 월런 오티그니스-루바인-라-니우브에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Dormer antes 1514, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Newdegate родилась 18 августа 1496 г. в местности харефиелд, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Newdegate было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Amphilicia Neville, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Dormer перед 1514 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 7 июля 1568 г. в местности оттигниес-лоувеин-ла-неув, брабант валлон, Бельгия в возрасте 71 год.
